items.title: Market Crash Warning? Wall Street Veteran Says Mid-March Could Mark a Turning Point
items.description: Marc Chaikin explains why the presidential election cycle, weakening tech stocks, and rising geopolitical risk could signal a correction, and how investors can prepare now.

items.title: Daily ETF Flows: IWM Nets $1.5B
items.description: While international equities remain popular, flows surged back into U.S. stocks on Tuesday, including nearly $1.5 billion in small-caps via the iShares Russell 2000 ETF IWM.

items.title: CarGurus Is Quietly Becoming the Auto Marketplace to Beat
items.description: While the broader market has been grinding lower in early 2026, CarGurus (NASDAQ:CARG) has been quietly doing something most auto marketplace competitors can only dream about: growing faster, getting leaner, and embedding itself deeper into dealer operations across the country and internationally. The stock is up 12.4% since its Q4 earnings report while SPY has ... CarGurus Is Quietly Becoming the Auto Marketplace to Beat

items.title: S&P 500 Index Profit Margins Tighten. Are Tariffs To Blame?
items.description: Analysts' estimates and companies' guidance have weakened since the start of the year, resulting in a Q1 estimated total EPS growth rate of 11.5%.

items.title: Disinflation Continues With Unknowns Ahead
items.description: February CPI update: core inflation cools, durable goods deflate, services/housing ease. Iran conflict adds energy uncertainty.
